title: Sea Magik Natural Shampoo - SLS Free, Exfoliating and Volumising with Pink Salt Granules, Professional Spa Hair Treatment with Fragrance, Deeply Cleanses, Vegan, Cruelty Free (200g)

features: AWARD-WINNING: Volumising and clarifying Spa treatment shampoo that exfoliates your hair from dirt, product build-up, and pollution for hair that’s full of volume, deeply cleansed, and smelling lime fresh.

SINCE 1981: We have spent 40 years perfecting the infusion of mineral salts into skincare and haircare products and treatments to deliver outstanding results and relief from skin and hair concerns, including repairing and hydrating skin cells not just at the surface level, but beyond.

POWERFUL INGREDIENTS: Infused with mineral-rich pink Himalayan salt granules to exfoliate dead skin cells and stimulate the scalp for healthier hair. Organic seaweed strengthens hair with a powerful blend of vitamins, minerals, and amino acids for extra volume and bounce.
NATURAL OILS: 100% natural essential oil fragrance with cleansing and refreshing lime, rosemary, and cypress oils that are designed to uplift the senses while you restore damaged or dry hair.
VEGAN & CRUELTY FREE: Free from dairy, gluten, GMOs, parabens, PEGs, petrochemicals, silicones, and other nasties. Plus, the recyclable tube is sustainably made using bio-based sugarcane plastic.
